\tzpentry{ID4385}{Lagrangian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4385 introduces Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \ket{\Psi_p} = \int_{0}^{L}\int_{0}^{L} \mathrm{d}s_1\,\mathrm{d}s_2\; \Psi_p(s_1,\sigma_1; s_2,\sigma_2)\, \hat{\psi}_{p,\sigma_1}^\dagger(s_1) \hat{\psi}_{p,\sigma_2}^\dagger(s_2) \ket{0}, \end{equation}
